nodes.label: **"Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.** Simon Willison's Apr 19 thesis — that personal AI is faster and more reliable hitting h…
nodes.description: **"Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.** Simon Willison's Apr 19 thesis — that personal AI is faster and more reliable hitting headless services than driving a GUI — frames an axis against browser-operating agents (Claude in Chrome, etc.). By H2 2026, expect a "headless-preferred" metadata standard on MCP / Agent Registry surfaces.

description.en: **"Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.** Simon Willison's Apr 19 thesis — that personal AI is faster and more reliable hitting headless services than driving a GUI — frames an axis against browser-operating agents (Claude in Chrome, etc.). By H2 2026, expect a "headless-preferred" metadata standard on MCP / Agent Registry surfaces.
description.ja: **"Headless Everything" アーキテクチャの標準化** — Simon Willison が Apr 19 に提起した「Personal AI のために GUI ではなく headless が速い」という主張は、ブラウザ操作エージェント（Claude in Chrome など）との対立軸として広がる。2026 後半には MCP / Agent Registry 上に「headless 優先」メタデータが標準化される。

description.en: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric.
description.ja: **AI SaaS 間の OAuth 横断信任が最大のエンタープライズリスクに** — Vercel–Context.ai 事例は、社員が個人で連携した AI Office SaaS が企業の Google Workspace 全体を侵害経路に変えることを示した。2026 Q3 までに、主要 SSO プロバイダ（Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace）は **AI SaaS 向け OAuth スコープを "AI 拡張" カテゴリとして分離**、管理者が「Allow All」既定を一括ブロックできる制御を標準化する。CASB / SSPM ベンダーも「AI 連携が閲覧する企業データ量」を独立メトリクスとしてレポート化する。

nodes.label: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedroc…
nodes.short_label: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the n…
nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines.

description.en: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines.
description.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。

nodes.short_label: Capital markets reset their valuation o…
nodes.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.

description.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.
description.ja: **「AI エージェントに displace されるエンタープライズ SaaS」の金融市場評価が 2026 Q2 中にリセット** — ServiceNow の Apr 23 の **-18%（過去最悪の 1 日下落）** と IBM の同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracle の連鎖下落は、「AI のコスト削減恩恵 < AI による既存ワークフロー自動化による displace」への資本市場の評価軸シフトの現れ。2026 Q2 中に Gartner / Forrester の Magic Quadrant / Wave 系レポートで「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」の二軸化が明示され、時価総額評価は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触る API 呼び出しの占有度」に移行。アナリストコンセンサス更新の遅行により、向こう 2 四半期で同様の 15%+ 暴落が Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet など 3-5 社で再発。
description.es: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.

summary.ja: **「AI エージェントに displace されるエンタープライズ SaaS」の金融市場評価が 2026 Q2 中にリセット** — ServiceNow の Apr 23 の **-18%（過去最悪の 1 日下落）** と IBM の同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracle の連鎖下落は、「AI のコスト削減恩恵 < AI による既存ワークフロー自動化による displace」への資本市場の評価軸シフトの現れ。2026 Q2 中に Gartner / Forrester の Magic Quadrant / Wave 系レポートで「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」の二軸化が明示され、時価総額評価は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触る API 呼び出しの占有度」に移行。アナリストコンセンサス更新の遅行により、向こう 2 四半期で同様の 15%+ 暴落が Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet など 3-5 社で再発。

A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

short_label.ja: AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化
short_label.es: El rechazo público a la IA se convierte…

description.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.
description.ja: **AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化 — Q3 2026 までに米国の少なくとも 1 州が、Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を可決。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅襲撃 + 4/15 CNBC のデータセンター反発記事 + 4/26 Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェント トラフィックを監視できていない」) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバ レジストリ、認証情報のボールティング + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサル ログアウト) が規制を前倒しで引き寄せる。米国の州 (CA、NY、TX のいずれかが有力) が Q3 2026 までに **「エージェントを第一級アイデンティティとして登録、MCP コール チェーンのロギング、アクションごとの同意」** を義務付ける法令を成立させ、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映。EU AI Act 第 26 条施行も並行して始動。
description.es: **El rechazo público a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" que refleja el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el artículo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tráfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotación automática, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
description.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

summary.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

nodes.short_label: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the…
nodes.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

short_label.fil: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpi…

description.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.
description.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + FOMC(4/28-29)が、ハイパースケーラーによる初の**トークンあたりマージンゲート型設備投資**開示を2026年Q3までに引き出す — 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium シリコンレベル契約が新ドクトリンを支える。** 2026年のMag 7合計設備投資 約$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約$200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft FY26 約$146BでFY27は$170Bへ)は、すでに「設備投資を信用で評価する」段階から「実利を要求する」段階へ移行した相場に着地する。**4/27の契約再構築はAIラボの計算需要をハイパースケーラー所有のシリコンへ明示的にルーティング**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU を大規模に)。2026年Q3までに、Big-3ハイパースケーラーの少なくとも1社が**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークンあたりマージン下限に基づき増分GPU設備投資をゲート化**する公的開示を行う — 公開クラウドからの初の「AIインフラROIスレッショルド」。NVDA $5T級時価総額とAMD / Cerebras IPOの軌道は維持される; 支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は変わる。
description.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan explícitamente el cómputo de los laboratorios IA a través de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 públicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" explícito desde una nube pública. La capitalización clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí.
description.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito.

By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. nodes.label: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disc…
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

description.en: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
description.ja: **(非技術) 4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。
description.es: **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
summary.ja: **(非技術) 4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。
summary.es: **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos.
summary.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

nodes.label: **(Tech) By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardizat…
nodes.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.

description.en: **(Tech) By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
description.ja: **(Tech) 2026年下期までに、OpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft ライセンス非独占化のリセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデル SLA 標準化を引き起こす — Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも 1 社がモデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性 SLA を比較可能な単一フォーマットで公開し、非 OpenAI のフロンティアラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「全クラウドにフロンティア」型のミラー契約を SLA 開示と共に締結する。** 4/27 Microsoft–OpenAI 再構成でクラウド独占が外れ、4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(限定プレビュー)が独占解除後初のクロスクラウド・フロンティア配備、4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 のモデルプロバイダ主導モデル発見 + Bedrock アカウント状態公開が開発者側プリミティブ、4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 リージョン GA + Managed Harness 4 リージョンプレビューがオーケストレーション基盤、4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox プレビューが非 Bedrock 系の並走経路。駆動力はエンタープライズの調達 — フロンティアモデルがクロス展開された瞬間、購買担当の最初の比較軸は「モデル」から「モデル + SLA on cloud-of-record」に変わる。SLA 標準化の最初の打ち手は AWS Bedrock(モデル選択肢が広く、エンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢が最強)が有力、非 OpenAI のミラーは 4/27 Microsoft の非独占文言が「OpenAI 製品」に明示的に限定されており、Anthropic に空白を残しているため Anthropic が最有力。
description.es: **(Tech) Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos.
description.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.

summary.es: **(Tech) Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos.
summary.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

nodes.label: **(Non-tech) The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as t…
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.

description.en: **(Non-tech) The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.
description.ja: **(Non-tech) Mag 7 ウィーク + $700B AI 設備投資数値 + 4/30 Apple の +$1,000億自社株買い + 4% 増配の組み合わせで、2026年は AI 設備投資の開示が二系統に分化する年となる — 2026 Q4 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(4/29 に AI ランレート $37B(+123%)を開示済みの Microsoft が最有力)が AI 事業 KPI(ランレート、課金シート、デプロイ済みエージェント)の月次 10-Q 脚注開示に踏み切り、より広い S&P AI コホート(Apple、上場後 Cerebras、Broadcom)が AI 事業別マージン四半期開示で続く。** 4/29 Microsoft の $37B AI ランレート(+123%)が開示の前例、4/30 Apple のサービス売上過去最高 $30.98B(+16%)に AI サービス別行はなし、4/30 Big Tech Q1 設備投資 $130B 超 → 2026年通期 $700B が買い手側の圧力数値、5月中旬 Cerebras IPO の $22-25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% の収益集中)が開示の負荷試験。4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達 + 4/29 Mag 7 のまだら戻り(META -7.5%、MSFT -3.8% on print day)が示すとおり、公開市場は不正確な AI 売上数値に対して既に価格差別を始めている。SEC の介入を待たず、最も開示する 1 社が前例を打ち、コホートを追従させる経路が最小抵抗。買い手側こそが駆動力。
description.es: **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI más amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgación trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgación; los Servicios récord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen línea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el número de presión del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estrés de la divulgación. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el día de la publicación) muestran que el mercado público ya está discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la divulgación voluntaria — la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test. Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure — ang buyside ang forcing function.

Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.
summary.ja: **(Non-tech) Mag 7 ウィーク + $700B AI 設備投資数値 + 4/30 Apple の +$1,000億自社株買い + 4% 増配の組み合わせで、2026年は AI 設備投資の開示が二系統に分化する年となる — 2026 Q4 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(4/29 に AI ランレート $37B(+123%)を開示済みの Microsoft が最有力)が AI 事業 KPI(ランレート、課金シート、デプロイ済みエージェント)の月次 10-Q 脚注開示に踏み切り、より広い S&P AI コホート(Apple、上場後 Cerebras、Broadcom)が AI 事業別マージン四半期開示で続く。** 4/29 Microsoft の $37B AI ランレート(+123%)が開示の前例、4/30 Apple のサービス売上過去最高 $30.98B(+16%)に AI サービス別行はなし、4/30 Big Tech Q1 設備投資 $130B 超 → 2026年通期 $700B が買い手側の圧力数値、5月中旬 Cerebras IPO の $22-25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% の収益集中)が開示の負荷試験。4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達 + 4/29 Mag 7 のまだら戻り(META -7.5%、MSFT -3.8% on print day)が示すとおり、公開市場は不正確な AI 売上数値に対して既に価格差別を始めている。SEC の介入を待たず、最も開示する 1 社が前例を打ち、コホートを追従させる経路が最小抵抗。買い手側こそが駆動力。
summary.es: **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI más amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgación trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgación; los Servicios récord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen línea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el número de presión del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estrés de la divulgación. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el día de la publicación) muestran que el mercado público ya está discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la divulgación voluntaria — la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador.
summary.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test. Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure — ang buyside ang forcing function.

description.en: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP.

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.
description.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。

nodes.label: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026…
nodes.short_label: Attack surface against the MCP protocol…
nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

description.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.
description.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。

summary.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。
summary.es: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. nodes.label: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to…
nodes.description: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**

short_label.ja: ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲…
short_label.es: El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler…

description.en: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。
description.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
description.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

short_label.es: Los servidores de inferencia se convier…

description.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.
description.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。
description.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar.
description.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

nodes.label: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + age…
nodes.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
description.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
description.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

nodes.label: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** S…
nodes.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。
description.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
description.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

summary.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
summary.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

nodes.short_label: The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates…
nodes.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.
