description.en: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.
description.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する — Q3 2026までに少なくとも1つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI)が監査済みの月次売上 + WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、Mag 7ハイパースケーラの少なくとも1社がBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン当たりマージンを生クラウド売上から分離して開示する。** 4/28のWSJは決定的だった: 単一の標的未達リークでOracleが4%、AMDが3%、Broadcomが4%、ソフトバンクが10%下落、しかも**4/27のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項撤回**(任意の「AGI宣言」によるIP取消リスクは既に消滅)に重ねての反応。Mag 7決算の集中 + 合算約7,000億ドルの2026キャペックス + 5月中旬の Cerebras IPO ($22B–$25B、G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の売上集中)を合わせると、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI収益学的開示を明示的に要求**している。Q3 2026までにSEC + アナリスト圧力で(a)少なくとも1ラボが公開月次売上 / WAUダッシュボード・ケイデンスへ、(b)Big-3クラウドの少なくとも1社が10-Q脚注でトークン当たりAIプラットフォーム・マージンを分離開示、を生む。「AGI」は形而上学的概念から金融商品プリミティブへ、「DAU/WAU」はプロダクトKPIからMD&Aへ昇格する。
description.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtración de off-target tumbó Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesión, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retiró el riesgo discrecional de revocación de IP por declaración AGI). Combinado con la colisión de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B–$25B (concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige explícitamente disclosure de economía AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presión SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab moviéndose a una cadencia pública de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafísica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A.
description.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".

summary.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".

nodes.label: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic…
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surf…
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
description.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
description.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

description.en: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
description.ja: **(技術) 2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
description.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

description.en: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
description.ja: **(Tech) 2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。
description.es: **(Tech) Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
description.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **(Tech) 2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tech) Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

nodes.label: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second…
nodes.description: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.

short_label.es: The era of "exclusive alliance between…

description.en: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラ × フロンティアラボの排他同盟」時代** — Amazon–Anthropic の 10 年 $100B コミットは、MS–OpenAI 提携に続く二つ目の「ハードウェア専用設計 × プラットフォーム独占」契約となる。2026 後半〜2027 前半で Google–（内製 Gemini）, Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–社内（Llama）, xAI–Oracle/NVDA の**5極体制**が固定化する。Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X の設計差が「モデルの挙動差」に直結し、開発者は**バックエンドポータビリティ**（MCP のようなランタイム非依存層）を必須要件として再評価する。

nodes.label: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferen…
nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

short_label.ja: 訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に
short_label.es: Training-vs-inference SKU split" become…

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.
description.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。

Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

description.en: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month — Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) — the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered.
description.ja: **「フロンティア AI ラボ × Tier-1 クラウドの容量囲い込み」が 2026 Q3 までに完全分割線として確定** — Google Cloud 単月で Anthropic（GB300 + TPU 大型契約）、Meta（GB300 容量）、Thinking Machines Lab（A4X Max）の 3 件を確定させた事実は、「フロンティアモデル開発に十分な容量を持つクラウドは 3 社（AWS / Azure / GCP）に絞られる」構造の固定化を意味する。Amazon が Anthropic に **追加 $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 容量 + 10 年 $100B コミット** で対抗、Azure は OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection 系を握り、GCP は Anthropic / TML / Meta を加える。2026 Q3 までに「自社クラウドを持たない / フロンティアラボとの長期容量契約を持たない第 4 のハイパースケーラ候補」（Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave など）は **「フロンティア訓練不可能だが推論最適化に特化」** へ位置付けが完全シフトし、AI チップ生態系は「訓練容量 = 3 社寡占 / 推論 = 多層化」の二層構造に固まる。

nodes.label: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package —…
nodes.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.

description.en: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.
description.ja: **「27B Dense + 1M context」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ・ローカル LLM の事実上の標準ポジション** — Qwen3.6-27B の公開は、「MoE のルーティング複雑性なし・RTX 4090 1 枚で回る・1M context・Apache 2.0」という組み合わせがフラグシップ級コーディング能力に届くことを実証した。2026 Q3 までに Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma 系列がそれぞれ 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama 系ライセンスのモデルを投入し、70B+ MoE の差別化要素は「マルチモーダル理解」「ツール網羅」「長期推論」に限定される。オンプレ推論の既定 VRAM 要件は RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB から **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB** へ下方シフト。

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.
description.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

nodes.label: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Olla…
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
description.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

nodes.short_label: Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM…
nodes.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
description.ja: **(技術) 2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
description.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

nodes.description: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.

description.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.

summary.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.
summary.ja: **「GGUF 供給経路」がサプライチェーン攻撃の新しい主戦場** — SGLang CVE-2026-5760（GGUF 経由の Jinja2 SSTI で RCE）は「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリア」である現実を可視化した。2026 Q3 までに Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope は **モデルカード + chat_template の署名検証／サンドボックス実行** を標準要件化し、Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM も GGUF ロード時に SSTI スキャンをデフォルト有効化する。

nodes.short_label: Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to r…
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

description.en: **(Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.
description.ja: **(非技術) Powell が 4/29 に Chair 任期終了 (5/15) 後も理事会に残る決定が 2026年金融政策市場心理を再構築 — 2026年 Q4 までに FOMC は Warsh Chair 体制下で反対票 ≤2 のより小さい反対規範に戻るが、Powell の理事会継続在任は金利ではなく Fed 調査ガバナンス問題のマージナルスイング票となる。** 4/29 は 1992年10月以来の最多反対 FOMC (8-4); Miran は -25bp を主張; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan は緩和バイアス含めることに反対。同日 Warsh 指名が上院銀行委員会を通過。2026-2027年セットアップ: Warsh が Chair 席で Powell が 2028年任期末まで理事会に在任; Chair がフレーミングを設定するため、利率コールでは反対姿勢が圧縮; トランプ政権 Fed 調査の結果が動くたびに Powell のマージナル票はガバナンスシグナルになる。市場は金利のフォワードガイダンスボラティリティを下げ、Fed 自体の制度リスクプレミアムを上げる方向に値付けする。1992年の前例比較は珍奇な話題ではなく、新しい Fed ガバナンス体制の金融プレス解説における構造的参照点になる。
description.es: **(No tecnológica) La decisión de Powell del 29-abr de permanecer en la Junta de Gobernadores tras vencer su mandato como Chair (15-may) reconfigura la psicología del mercado de política monetaria 2026 — para Q4 2026 el FOMC vuelve a una norma de menor disidencia (≤2 disidentes) bajo Warsh como Chair, pero la presencia continua de Powell en la Junta se convierte en el voto pivote marginal sobre la cuestión de gobernanza de la investigación Fed, no sobre los tipos.** El 29-abr fue el FOMC con más disidentes desde oct-1992 (8-4); Miran quería -25pb; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan se opusieron a incluir sesgo de relajación. La nominación de Warsh avanzó del Comité Bancario del Senado el mismo día. La configuración 2026-2027: Powell en la Junta hasta el final de su mandato en 2028 con Warsh en el sillón del Chair; la postura disidente se comprime en las decisiones de tipos porque el Chair fija el encuadre; el voto marginal de Powell se convierte en señal de gobernanza siempre que se mueva el resultado de la investigación Fed de Trump. Los mercados ponen precio a una menor volatilidad de forward guidance sobre tipos pero a una mayor prima de riesgo institucional sobre la propia Fed. La comparación con el precedente de 1992 deja de ser una curiosidad y pasa a ser un punto de referencia estructural en las explicaciones de la prensa financiera del nuevo régimen de gobernanza Fed.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Binabago ng desisyon ni Powell noong Apr 29 na manatili sa Board of Governors lampas sa pagtatapos ng Chair-term niya (May 15) ang 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — bago matapos ang Q4 2026, babalik ang FOMC sa mas maliit na dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair, ngunit ang patuloy na presensya ni Powell sa Board ang magiging marginal swing vote sa Fed-investigation governance question, hindi sa rates.** Ang Apr 29 ang highest-dissent FOMC mula Oct-1992 (8-4); gusto ni Miran ang -25bp; tutol sina Hammack/Kashkari/Logan sa pagsasama ng easing-bias. Umusad ang nominasyon ni Warsh mula Senate Banking sa parehong araw. Ang 2026-2027 setup: Powell sa Board hanggang term-end 2028 habang nasa Chair seat si Warsh; mag-co-compress ang dissent posture sa rate calls dahil itinatakda ng Chair ang framing; ang marginal vote ni Powell ang magiging governance signal kapag may galaw sa Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome. Pe-presyuhan ng markets ang mas maliit na forward-guidance volatility sa rates ngunit mas malaki ang institutional-risk premium sa Fed mismo. Hihinto na ang 1992-precedent comparison sa pagiging curiosity at magiging structural reference point sa financial-press explanations ng bagong Fed governance regime.

Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

nodes.label: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.1…
nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter.

description.en: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter.
description.ja: **1-bit ネイティブ学習が主流の量子化代替に** — Bonsai 8B が1.15GB で実用品質を示したことで、4/8bit 事後量子化ではなく学習時から1-bit で設計する流れが、エッジ LLM の標準になる可能性。次の四半期で Qwen / Llama ファミリの 1-bit 派生が続くと見る。

description.en: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier.
description.ja: **プロプライエタリ再膨張とオープンウェイトの地政学分断** — Qwen3.6-Max-Preview が「プロプライエタリのまま API のみ公開」に舵を切った点、Anthropic も Mythos Preview で段階ゲーティング化した点から、2026 Q3 には**「最強モデル＝非オープンウェイト」が明確化**。一方、オープンウェイトは 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama 系に最適化が集中し、ローカル = 実用帯、クラウド = フロンティアという線引きが制度化される。

nodes.label: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-2…
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."

short_label.ja: 1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行
short_label.es: The "1M context as default" open-weight…

description.en: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."
description.ja: **「1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行** — DeepSeek V4 の「1M context をボルトオンではなくゼロから設計」方針、Qwen3.6-27B の 262K→1M、Claude Opus 4.7 の 1M token context（Bedrock）、GPT-5.5 の長文脈強化は同じ方向。2026 Q3 までに「native 1M context」がオープン重みの最低ラインとなり、32K-128K 止まりの既存モデルはレガシー扱いに転落。RAG パイプラインは「検索→コンテキスト挿入」から「全データをそのまま投入＋動的プルーニング」方式に主流シフトし、ベクトル DB ベンダは「長 context キャッシュ最適化層」として再定義を迫られる。
description.es: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."

nodes.label: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-mar…
nodes.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

short_label.es: Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/0…

description.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.
description.ja: **Mag 7 Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブをリセット — Q3 2026 にハイパースケーラー初の「トークン マージン ゲート」による AI 設備投資階層化が公表される。** Alphabet (1,750〜1,850 億ドル)、Amazon (約 2,000 億ドル)、Meta (1,150〜1,350 億ドル)、Microsoft (Azure ラガード再評価リスク) の 2026 年合計 capex ガイダンスはおよそ 6,500〜7,000 億ドルに達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI 現実点検」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算で **トークンあたり収益のエグジット ベロシティ** テーゼが検証されるか、マルチプル圧縮が引き起こされるかが分かれる。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラーのうち少なくとも 1 社が、Bedrock/Azure/Vertex の **トークン マージン下限** を増分 GPU 設備投資の条件として **公的に明示** する。これは公開クラウドからの最初の明示的「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」であり、2024-2025 の「投資せざるを得ない」教義の終焉を告げる。フロンティア ラボのアンカーディール (Google 400 億 / Anthropic、Amazon 250 億 / Anthropic、OpenAI 200 億 / Cerebras + Microsoft) は可視的な圧力リリースバルブとなる。
description.es: **Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/04) reescriben la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 verá al primer hyperscaler que escalonará públicamente el capex de IA por una compuerta de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet (175.000-185.000 M USD), Amazon (~200.000 M USD), Meta (115.000-135.000 M USD) y Microsoft (con riesgo de re-rating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~650.000-700.000 M USD frente al "control de realidad del ROI de la IA" de Wall Street, los resultados del 29-30/04 validarán la tesis de **velocidad de escape de ingreso por token** o desencadenarán una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos un hyperscaler de los Big-3 **condicionará públicamente el capex incremental en GPU a un piso de margen por token en Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer "umbral de ROI de infraestructura de IA" explícito desde una nube pública, poniendo fin a la doctrina 2024-2025 de "gasta o muere". Los acuerdos ancla de los frontier labs (Google 40.000 M / Anthropic, Amazon 25.000 M / Anthropic, OpenAI 20.000 M / Cerebras + Microsoft) pasan a ser la válvula visible de alivio.
description.fil: **I-reset ng Mag 7 Q1 earnings (4/29-30) ang AI-capex ROI narrative — sa Q3 2026, may unang hyperscaler na publikong magta-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot ng ~$650B-$700B kontra sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang 4/29-30 prints ay maaaring magpatibay sa thesis ng **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** o magtigger ng multiple compression. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve.

summary.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**

description.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**
description.ja: **Physical AI の SaaS 化と「Robot-as-a-Service」基盤競争** — Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos の相次ぐ提携は、**ロボット制御モデルの訓練パイプラインがクラウド側に集約** される方向性を示す。2026 Q3 にはロボット 1 台あたりのクラウド計算課金（訓練 + 同期シミュ + ポリシ更新）がエンタープライズ契約の既定項目となり、ロボット本体は「動くコンピュート終端」として商品コモディティ化、メーカは **フリート管理ソフトウェアの経常収益** へシフトする。

The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**
