nodes.label: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours…
nodes.description: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments."

description.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments."
description.ja: **「Physical AI の 8 時間本番稼働」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ調達条件に** — Siemens–Humanoid の HMND 01 Alpha が Erlangen で「デモではなく本番ライン」で **8 時間 / 90% 成功率 / 60 tote/h** を達成したことは、「ヒューマノイド = PoC」の段階からの明確な卒業点。2026 Q4 までに大手製造業（VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / トヨタ）の RFP から「24 時間連続稼働実績」「1 週間 MTBF」「90%+ 自律完了率」「既存 MES / PLC 統合」が事実上の足切り条件に組み込まれ、Physical AI の競争軸は「見栄えの良いデモ動画」から「既存 OT 環境への差し込み容易性」に完全に移る。

nodes.label: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** …
nodes.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.

nodes.label: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop …
nodes.description: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

short_label.ja: AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化
short_label.es: El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sient…

description.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.
description.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。
description.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica.
description.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

summary.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica.

Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

nodes.short_label: Non-tech) Powell's decision to stay on…
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

description.en: **(Non-tech) Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.
description.ja: **(Non-tech) Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる。** 4/29 は 1992年以来初の 4 反対 FOMC、Powell の理事残留は 1948年以降前例なし、Warsh は同日に上院銀行委員会で承認、本会議採決は 5/15 までに予定。4/30 の Mag 7 月間相場(2020年以来最大)は FOMC 反対姿勢が裏付けていない利下げ期待を一部織り込んでおり、5/1 雇用統計が市場予想 13.5 万人(3月 17.8 万人から減速)で出れば、議長交代窓口に入る最初の弱含みデータとなる。Powell は 4/29 に「shadow chair にはならない」と明言したが、Warsh 議長下で Powell が反対理事として 7 名理事会に座る制度的事実が、金利ではなく FRB 独立性問題でその力学を生む。市場は 2026 H2 を通じて金利ボラを縮小し、制度リスクプレミアムを拡大する価格付けに動く。
description.es: **(No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" — para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensión (≤2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuestión de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El rótulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no seré un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimirán el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflarán el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility — pagdating ng Q4 2026 babalik ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh sa smaller-dissent norm (≤2) sa rate calls pero ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ang magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; mas magiging sensitibo ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language.** Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang precedent mula 1948; nakumpirma si Warsh sa Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (pinakamagandang buwan mula 2020) ay partly priced sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay tinanggihan ni Powell sa Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") pero ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board na may Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ni Warsh chair ay gumagawa eksakto ng dynamic na iyon sa Fed-independence questions, kahit hindi sa rates. Pipilitin ng markets na liitin ang rate-volatility pricing at palakihin ang institutional-risk pricing sa buong H2 2026.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **(Non-tech) Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる。** 4/29 は 1992年以来初の 4 反対 FOMC、Powell の理事残留は 1948年以降前例なし、Warsh は同日に上院銀行委員会で承認、本会議採決は 5/15 までに予定。4/30 の Mag 7 月間相場(2020年以来最大)は FOMC 反対姿勢が裏付けていない利下げ期待を一部織り込んでおり、5/1 雇用統計が市場予想 13.5 万人(3月 17.8 万人から減速)で出れば、議長交代窓口に入る最初の弱含みデータとなる。Powell は 4/29 に「shadow chair にはならない」と明言したが、Warsh 議長下で Powell が反対理事として 7 名理事会に座る制度的事実が、金利ではなく FRB 独立性問題でその力学を生む。市場は 2026 H2 を通じて金利ボラを縮小し、制度リスクプレミアムを拡大する価格付けに動く。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" — para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensión (≤2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuestión de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El rótulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no seré un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimirán el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflarán el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility — pagdating ng Q4 2026 babalik ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh sa smaller-dissent norm (≤2) sa rate calls pero ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ang magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; mas magiging sensitibo ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language.** Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang precedent mula 1948; nakumpirma si Warsh sa Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (pinakamagandang buwan mula 2020) ay partly priced sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay tinanggihan ni Powell sa Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") pero ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board na may Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ni Warsh chair ay gumagawa eksakto ng dynamic na iyon sa Fed-independence questions, kahit hindi sa rates. Pipilitin ng markets na liitin ang rate-volatility pricing at palakihin ang institutional-risk pricing sa buong H2 2026.
